chunks.text: End of Semester Information EECS Instructional Computer Accounts End of Semester - Summer 2018 Cardkeys expire Friday Aug 10 at 11:59pm EECS Summer Session class accounts and EECS Microsoft Imagine accounts expire Monday Aug 13 at 9am Frequently aske

counts expire Monday Aug 13 at 9am Frequently asked: Can I copy files from my account? (Copy to your computer using scp, a USB flash drive or Google Drive. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/pub.cgi?file=ssh.help http://inst.eecs.berkeley.e

iles in my expired class account? (archived and deleted after Aug 15) What happens to email sent to my expired account @imail? (bounces or is received by a new user next semester) How to I get a more permanent account? (See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.
permanent account? (See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html ) EECS Instructional Support (ISG) inst@eecs.berkeley.edu 378 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda August 2018
